name: Stripe Checkout
description: Implement Stripe Checkout for one-time payments. Includes a checkout session API route, success/cancel redirect pages, webhook handler for payment_intent.succeeded, and order fulfillment trigger.

steps.description: Create Stripe client singleton with API version pinned to latest stable
Create POST /api/checkout that creates Stripe Checkout Session with success_url and cancel_url
Create success page that retrieves session and shows order confirmation
Create Stripe webhook handler with signature verification, handle payment_intent.succeeded and checkout.session.completed
Test webhooks locally with Stripe CLI
